prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model using historical daily log returns of SCHW over the past 501 trading days (from 2022-06-20 to 2024-06-18). The calculated daily drift (mean log return) is 0.0001 and daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns) is 0.0163. The point estimate for the price in 20 days is the median of the predicted log-normal distribution, which accounts for volatility drag. The confidence intervals are derived from the same log-normal distribution using corresponding Z-scores, indicating the range within which the price is expected to fall at the given confidence levels.
